allow: Bash(SRC="/home/runner/workspace/截圖/螢幕擷取畫面 2026-03-16 132152.png" && PUB="/home/runner/workspace/public" && magick "$SRC" -gravity center -extent 1780x1780 -background black "/tmp/octodock-square.png" && magick "/tmp/octodock-square.png" -resize 512x512 "$PUB/icon-512.png" && magick "/tmp/octodock-square.png" -resize 192x192 "$PUB/icon-192.png" && magick "/tmp/octodock-square.png" -resize 180x180 "$PUB/apple-touch-icon.png" && magick "/tmp/octodock-square.png" -resize 32x32 "/tmp/favicon-32.png" && magick "/tmp/octodock-square.png" -resize 16x16 "/tmp/favicon-16.png" && magick "/tmp/favicon-32.png" "/tmp/favicon-16.png" "$PUB/../src/app/favicon.ico" && echo "Done generating icons")

Bash(SRC="/home/runner/workspace/截圖/octodock-icon-final.png" && PUB="/home/runner/workspace/public" && magick "$SRC" -resize 512x512 -strip "$PUB/icon-512.png" && magick "$SRC" -resize 192x192 -strip "$PUB/icon-192.png" && magick "$SRC" -resize 180x180 -strip "$PUB/apple-touch-icon.png" && magick "$SRC" -resize 32x32 -strip "/tmp/favicon-32.png" && magick "$SRC" -resize 16x16 -strip "/tmp/favicon-16.png" && magick "/tmp/favicon-32.png" "/tmp/favicon-16.png" "$PUB/../src/app/favicon.ico" && echo "Done")
